subject: 3D globe hero for a daily geography games web app
style_reference: Mapbox GL / Mapbox Standard — clean cartographic, not gamey

composition.framing: large sphere lower-right, cropped by viewport edge
composition.camera: slight tilt (~25–35°), soft perspective, no extreme fisheye
composition.background: flat warm off-white or very subtle paper texture (#f2f0e6 family)

globe.lighting: soft studio key from upper-left, gentle rim light on terminator
globe.atmosphere: very subtle atmospheric glow (thin haze), no heavy neon halo
globe.land: low-contrast continents; optional very faint hillshade, not busy
globe.graticule: optional faint meridians/parallels like vector map overlays
globe.labels: none or extremely minimal; no country name clutter

avoid: game UI chrome on the globe

output.format: wide hero asset or CSS-ready description
output.aspect: 16:9 or 3:2, transparent PNG if globe isolated optional
